channel.title: projects on trinity
channel.description: Recent content in projects on trinity

item.title: loupe
item.description:
emulation-based malware deobfuscator and unpacker built in Go using Unicorn Engine.

status: active development

stack: Go, Unicorn Engine, PE parsing

github →

item.title: nox
item.description:
intrusion detection system with stateful rules engine, MITRE ATT&CK mapping, structured logging, Prometheus metrics, and gRPC.

status: complete

github →
